summary: Application with pothole detection feature that alerts users 50 meters before encountering potholes on the road

existing_features.title: Extend the road detection algorithm to identify potholes on the road surface using visual analysis of road texture, depth discontinuities, and surface irregularities
Calculate estimated distance to detected potholes based on camera perspective, road geometry, and pixel position in the frame
Trigger audio and visual alerts when potholes are detected within 50 meters, displaying 'Potholes on road' warning message
Add pothole detection results to the backend ObstacleEvent storage, including pothole type classification, location coordinates, and distance information
Display detected potholes in the MetricsPanel with count and closest distance information

new_feature_requests.summary: Pothole detection system that alerts users 50 meters before potholes
